{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1994
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1994
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 18 – August 10
|num_teams       = 32
|winners       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|second       = [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
|matches         = 62
|goals           = 149
|scoring_leader = [[Paulinho McLaren]] (6)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1993 Copa do Brasil|1993]]
|next_season      = [[1995 Copa do Brasil|1995]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1994''' was the 6th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 18, 1994, and concluded on August 10, 1994, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Olímpico Monumental]] in [[Porto Alegre]], in which [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] lifted the trophy for the second time with a 1–0 victory over [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]].

[[Paulo César Vieira Rosa|Paulinho McLaren]], of [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]], with 6 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 32 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played in two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Participating teams==
{|border="0" cellpadding="2"
|- valign="top"
|
*[[4 de Julho Esporte Clube|4 de Julho (PI)]] 
*[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]] 
*[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
*[[Sociedade Esportiva Ariquemes|Ariquemes (RO)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
*[[Campinense Clube|Campinense (PB)]]
*[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Esporte Clube Comercial (MS)|Comercial (MS)]]
*[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
*[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]] 
*[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]] 
*[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
*[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
*[[Independência Futebol Clube|Independência (AC)]]
*[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Kaburé Esporte Clube|Kaburé (TO)]]
*[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]
*[[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão (MA)]]
*[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
*[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]
*[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
*[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]] 
*[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]
*[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José (AP)]]
*[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]] 
*[[Sorriso Esporte Clube|Sorriso (MT)]]
*[[Taguatinga Esporte Clube|Taguatinga (DF)]]
*[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]
*[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
|}

==Competition stages==
{{32TeamBracket
| RD1-team01 ='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-team02 =[[Sorriso Esporte Clube|Sorriso (MT)]]
| RD1-score01=4 1
| RD1-score02=0 1 
| RD1-team03 ='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Ariquemes|Ariquemes (RO)]]''' 
| RD1-team04 =[[Independência Futebol Clube|Independência (AC)]]
| RD1-score03=0 2
| RD1-score04=1 0 
| RD1-team05 =[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB (AL)]] 
| RD1-team06 ='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score05=0 1
| RD1-score06=1 3 
| RD1-team07 =[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]] 
| RD1-team08 ='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score07=2 1
| RD1-score08=2 2 
| RD1-team09 ='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]''' 
| RD1-team10 =[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
| RD1-score09=4 2
| RD1-score10=3 0
| RD1-team11 ='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]''' 
| RD1-team12 =[[Maranhão Atlético Clube|Maranhão (MA)]]
| RD1-score11=1 3
| RD1-score12=1 0 
| RD1-team13 =[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]] 
| RD1-team14 ='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score13=1 1 (pen: 2)
| RD1-score14=1 1 (pen: 4)
| RD1-team15 =[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]] 
| RD1-team16 ='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score15=0 1
| RD1-score16=2 1 
| RD1-team17 =[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]] 
| RD1-team18 ='''[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]'''
| RD1-score17=2 1
| RD1-score18=2 1 
| RD1-team19 =[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
| RD1-team20 ='''[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa São José|São José (AP)]]'''
| RD1-score19=1 1
| RD1-score20=2 2 
| RD1-team21 =[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]] 
| RD1-team22 ='''[[Esporte Clube Comercial (MS)|Comercial (MS)]]'''
| RD1-score21=0 0 (pen: 5)
| RD1-score22=0 0 (pen: 6)
| RD1-team23 ='''[[Kaburé Esporte Clube|Kaburé (TO)]]'''
| RD1-team24 =[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
| RD1-score23=2 0
| RD1-score24=0 1 
| RD1-team25 ='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]''' 
| RD1-team26 =[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
| RD1-score25=1 1 
| RD1-score26=1 0
| RD1-team27 =[[Taguatinga Esporte Clube|Taguatinga (DF)]]
| RD1-team28 ='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score27=0 1
| RD1-score28=2 2 
| RD1-team29 ='''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]''' 
| RD1-team30 =[[Campinense Clube|Campinense (PB)]]
| RD1-score29=2 1
| RD1-score30=0 2 
| RD1-team31 =[[4 de Julho Esporte Clube|4 de Julho (PI)]] 
| RD1-team32 ='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score31=1 2
| RD1-score32=3 5 
| RD2-team01 ='''Vitória (BA)''' 
| RD2-team02 =Ariquemes (RO)
| RD2-score01=2 3
| RD2-score02=0 0 
| RD2-team03 =Corinthians (SP) 
| RD2-team04 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score03=0 2
| RD2-score04=2 2 
| RD2-team05 =Remo (PA) 
| RD2-team06 ='''Atlético (MG)'''
| RD2-score05=2 0
| RD2-score06=1 2
| RD2-team07 =Santa Cruz (PE) 
| RD2-team08 ='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score07=1 1
| RD2-score08=0 3 
| RD2-team09 ='''Linhares (ES)''' 
| RD2-team10 =São José (AP)
| RD2-score09=0 3
| RD2-score10=0 2 
| RD2-team11 ='''Comercial (MS)''' 
| RD2-team12 =Kaburé (TO)
| RD2-score11=2 2
| RD2-score12=0 0 
| RD2-team13 ='''Internacional (RS)''' 
| RD2-team14 =Bahia (BA)
| RD2-score13=1 4
| RD2-score14=0 5 
| RD2-team15 ='''Ceará (CE)''' 
| RD2-team16 =Palmeiras (SP)
| RD2-score15=0 1
| RD2-score16=0 1 
| RD3-team01 =Vitória (BA) 
| RD3-team02 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-score01=0 0
| RD3-score02=1 1 
| RD3-team03 ='''Vasco (RJ)''' 
| RD3-team04 =Atlético (MG)
| RD3-score03=3 4
| RD3-score04=1 3 
| RD3-team05 ='''Linhares (ES)''' 
| RD3-team06 =Comercial (MS)
| RD3-score05=1 1
| RD3-score06=0 1 
| RD3-team07 ='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD3-team08 =Internacional (RS)
| RD3-score07=1 1
| RD3-score08=0 2 
| RD4-team01 ='''Grêmio (RS)''' 
| RD4-team02 =Vasco (RJ)
| RD4-score01=0 2
| RD4-score02=0 1 
| RD4-team03 =Linhares (ES) 
| RD4-team04 ='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD4-score03=0 0
| RD4-score04=1 0 
| RD5-team01 ='''Grêmio (RS)''' 
| RD5-team02 =Ceará (CE)
| RD5-score01=0 1
| RD5-score02=0 0 
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1994 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|alt=Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''<br/>'''Second Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070828095101/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1994.htm Copa do Brasil 1994 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1994}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1994]]
[[Category:1994 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1994 in domestic association football cups]]
